params.active: Whether to use this price instead of Chainlink

getPrice(string).notice: Get the current USD price for a ticker (8 decimals)

getPriceByKey(bytes32).notice: Get price by pre-hashed key (gas efficient for internal callers)

hasFeed(string).notice: Check if a ticker has a registered feed

manualPrices(bytes32).notice: ticker → manually overridden price (used in testing / fallback)

maxAge().notice: Maximum age for a price to be considered fresh (default 1 hour)

registerFeed(string,address).notice: Register a Chainlink price feed for a ticker symbol

setManualPrice(string,uint256,bool).notice: Set a manual price override (for testing / emergency fallback)

useManualPrice(bytes32).notice: ticker → whether manual price is active

@notice ticker → whether manual price is active
